mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agency_team_publisher_rel(team_id, member_id, role_code, status) VALUES(#{teamId}, #{memberId}, #{roleCode}, 'ACTIVE') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 'ACTIVE', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE agency_team_publisher_rel SET status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT member_id FROM agency_team_publisher_rel WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY member_id ASC
